allow:
Bash(cat > /home/image-cf/tsconfig.json << 'EOF'
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ES2022",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "lib": ["ES2022"],
    "types": ["@cloudflare/workers-types"],
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
EOF)
Bash(export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="cfut_e8bXm2GEgxPiAV8xe2ryDX1vzRXbr16S7Rs9YlAQ468ce189" && npx wrangler d1 create image-cf-db 2>&1)
Bash(npx wrangler whoami 2>&1 || echo "Not logged in")
Bash(CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=cfut_z8z3F0tWPXa9BScgyn7gryaAkEjzNkgjG22zRWQdcccaa5fc npx wrangler r2 bucket create image-cf-bucket 2>&1)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute image-cf-db --local --command "ALTER TABLE images ADD COLUMN negative_prompt TEXT;" 2>&1)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute image-cf-db --remote --command "ALTER TABLE images ADD COLUMN negative_prompt TEXT;" 2>&1)
Bash(export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="cfut_z8z3F0tWPXa9BScgyn7gryaAkEjzNkgjG22zRWQdcccaa5fc" && timeout 60 npx wrangler tail --format pretty 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="cfut_z8z3F0tWPXa9BScgyn7gryaAkEjzNkgjG22zRWQdcccaa5fc" && npx wrangler deploy 2>&1)
Bash(git init && git remote add origin git@github.com:moujxiaXia/image-cf.git)
Bash(git config user.email "claude@example.com" && git config user.name "Claude Code")

Bash(git branch -m main && git commit -m "feat: initial commit - AI image gallery with Cloudflare Workers

Features:
- Multiple AI models support \(Flux.1 Schnell, Flux.2 Klein, SDXL, etc.\)
- Image generation with advanced options \(negative prompt, steps, guidance, seed\)
- Reference image upload for Flux.2 Klein model
- Date-based filtering and search functionality
- Admin panel with authentication
- Public gallery view
- R2 storage for images
- D1 database for metadata")

Bash(export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="cfut_z8z3F0tWPXa9BScgyn7gryaAkEjzNkgjG22zRWQdcccaa5fc" && echo "628456126215b0dcf869986374edd30d77806926d7c84e2c477c655f1161efba" | npx wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET 2>&1)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "security: remove sensitive info from wrangler.toml

- Move secrets to .dev.vars for local development
- Add .dev.vars to .gitignore
- Update wrangler.toml to use Cloudflare secrets for production")
